text.title: PII Scrubbing Recipe Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes traffic-class + consent state to scrub strategy.

decision-tree.root-question: Will the eval set draw from real production traffic with potential PII?

branch.question: PII density >30% of sampled rows OR free-form text class?

text.example: real_traffic=true → pii_risk=true → pii_density=0.67 → r1-bound-scope (single-source scope, ml_plus_human_review).
